app.description: Python porting workspace for the Claw Code rewrite effort
cmd.summary.help: render a Markdown summary of the Python porting workspace
cmd.manifest.help: print the current Python workspace manifest
cmd.parity_audit.help: compare the Python workspace against the local ignored TypeScript archive when available
cmd.tool_pool.help: show assembled tool pool with default settings
cmd.bootstrap_graph.help: show the mirrored bootstrap/runtime graph stages
cmd.subsystems.help: list the current Python modules in the workspace
cmd.commands.help: list mirrored command entries from the archived snapshot
cmd.tools.help: list mirrored tool entries from the archived snapshot
cmd.route.help: route a prompt across mirrored command/tool inventories
cmd.bootstrap.help: build a runtime-style session report from the mirrored inventories
cmd.turn_loop.help: run a small stateful turn loop for the mirrored runtime
cmd.flush_transcript.help: persist and flush a temporary session transcript
cmd.show_command.help: show one mirrored command entry by exact name
cmd.show_tool.help: show one mirrored tool entry by exact name
cmd.exec_command.help: execute a mirrored command shim by exact name
cmd.exec_tool.help: execute a mirrored tool shim by exact name
label.language_help: set interface language (en, zh, hi, es, fr)
cmd.lang.invalid: Unsupported language: {lang}. Supported: en, zh, hi, es, fr
